headline: BAE Systems to modernize Advanced Defensive System for the U.S. Air Force U-2 reconnaissance aircraft
summary: BAE Systems (LON: BA) was awarded a contract by Robins Air Force Base in Georgia to support and sustain the AN/ALQ-221 Advanced Defensive System (ADS) for the U.S. Air Force's U-2 Dragon Lady surveillance and reconnaissance aircraft. Under the contract, BAE Systems will provide continuous field service support for the aircraft's electronic warfare (EW) system, complete repairs to maintain system availability, and provide software updates so it can detect and engage new threats.

headline: Trump slams NATO allies for not joining Iran war effort, says U.S. never needed their help

headline: Boeing (BA) Is Down 5.1% After Landing US$2.8 Billion In New U.S. Defense Contracts
summary: In recent days, Boeing has secured several large U.S. defense awards, including Air Force and Navy contract modifications worth more than US$2.83 billion, alongside calls from President Trump for defense manufacturers to rapidly ramp up production capacity. These expanded defense commitments deepen Boeing's multi‑year military backlog, offering a counterweight to its commercial and space program challenges and reinforcing its role as a critical U.S. defense supplier. We’ll examine how this...

headline: The Invisible Metals Powering a Trillion-Dollar Economy
summary: America’s advanced weapons systems and multi-trillion-dollar civilian technology sectors depend on rare-earth magnet supply chains long dominated by China, prompting a strategic push to restore domestic metallization capacity.

raw.headline: The Invisible Metals Powering a Trillion-Dollar Economy
raw.summary: America’s advanced weapons systems and multi-trillion-dollar civilian technology sectors depend on rare-earth magnet supply chains long dominated by China, prompting a strategic push to restore domestic metallization capacity.
